rollGenerator.title: Roll Generator
rollGenerator.subtitle: Discover rolls based on your available ingredients

styles.fishDesc: Classic salmon, tuna, shrimp and more
styles.indulgentDesc: Decadent flavors, dragon rolls and more

rollGenerator.noResults: No matching rolls found. Try selecting more ingredients or a different style.

salmon_classic.name: Classic Salmon Roll
salmon_classic.desc: A timeless duo — fresh salmon with crisp cucumber, wrapped in perfectly seasoned sushi rice.

spicy_tuna.name: Spicy Tuna Roll
spicy_tuna.desc: Bold, fiery tuna with a creamy kick of spicy mayo. The one you'll be reaching for all night.

shrimp_tempura.name: Shrimp Tempura Roll
shrimp_tempura.desc: Crispy tempura shrimp with creamy avocado — a delightful contrast of textures.

eel_roll.name: Unagi Cucumber Roll
eel_roll.desc: Sweet, caramelized eel with cool cucumber and a drizzle of rich eel sauce.

salmon_avocado.name: Salmon & Avocado
salmon_avocado.desc: Buttery salmon meets creamy avocado — a classic pairing that never disappoints.

scallop_mango.name: Scallop Mango Roll
scallop_mango.desc: Delicate scallop with sweet tropical mango — an elegant, refreshing combination.

avocado_cucumber.name: Avocado Cucumber Roll
avocado_cucumber.desc: Simple, pure, and refreshing. The roll that proves less is truly more.

sweet_potato.name: Sweet Potato Roll
sweet_potato.desc: Roasted sweet potato with creamy avocado — comforting, slightly sweet, and utterly satisfying.

asparagus_sesame.name: Asparagus Sesame Roll
asparagus_sesame.desc: Tender asparagus with toasted sesame — clean flavors that feel like a breath of fresh air.

veggie_crunch.name: Veggie Crunch Roll
veggie_crunch.desc: A rainbow of fresh vegetables with a satisfying crunch in every single bite.

edamame.name: Edamame Roll
edamame.desc: Creamy edamame with avocado and a sprinkle of sesame — unexpectedly delicious.

dragon.name: Dragon Roll
dragon.desc: A legendary roll — shrimp tempura inside, luscious avocado draped over top like dragon scales.

rainbow.name: Rainbow Roll
rainbow.desc: A stunning array of colorful fish layered on top — a true feast for the eyes and palate.

volcano.name: Volcano Roll
volcano.desc: Baked spicy salmon bubbling on top, creating a dramatic and irresistible flavor explosion.

caterpillar.name: Caterpillar Roll
caterpillar.desc: Eel and cucumber inside, cascading avocado slices on top — as beautiful as it is delicious.

spicy_salmon_cream.name: Spicy Salmon Dream
spicy_salmon_cream.desc: Salmon and cream cheese with a spicy kick — indulgent, rich, and absolutely addictive.

slim_salmon.name: Slim Salmon Roll
slim_salmon.desc: Light, clean salmon with fresh vegetables and a zesty ponzu — your guilt-free pleasure.

tuna_light.name: Light Tuna Avocado
tuna_light.desc: Pure, clean tuna with creamy avocado — minimal and magnificent.

california_light.name: Light California
california_light.desc: The classic, lightened up — fresh, simple, and crowd-pleasing every time.

fresh_garden.name: Fresh Garden Roll
fresh_garden.desc: A vibrant medley of garden vegetables — fresh, crunchy, and surprisingly satisfying.

shopping.title: Shopping List
shopping.subtitle: Everything for a perfect sushi night
shopping.empty: Your shopping list is empty. Add items or generate from saved rolls.

calc.title: Quantity Calculator
calc.subtitle: Calculate how much you need for your sushi evening
calc.note: Based on standard rolls of 8 pieces each. Adjust to taste.

ratings.title: Ratings
ratings.subtitle: How did those rolls turn out?
ratings.empty: No ratings yet. Rate your first roll!

challenges.title: Sushi Challenges
challenges.subtitle: Fun challenges for your sushi evenings
challenges.empty: No completed challenges yet. Pick one and go!

no_rice.title: Rice-Free Roll
no_rice.desc: Make a delicious roll without using any rice. Cucumber wraps? Lettuce rolls? Get creative!

three_textures.title: Triple Texture
three_textures.desc: Create a roll that features exactly 3 different textures — crunchy, soft, and creamy all in one.

rainbow.title: Rainbow Roll
rainbow.desc: Make the most visually stunning, colorful roll you can. Eat with your eyes first!

minimalist.title: The Minimalist
minimalist.desc: Use a maximum of 3 ingredients total. Prove that simplicity is the ultimate sophistication.

crunchy.title: Crunch Time
crunchy.desc: Make a roll where every bite has that satisfying crunch — panko, tempura, or anything crispy!

five_ingredients.title: The Fantastic Five
five_ingredients.desc: Use exactly 5 ingredients — no more, no less. Precision is part of the challenge.

new_sauce.title: New Sauce Adventure
new_sauce.desc: Use a sauce you've never tried with sushi before. Miso? Tahini? Teriyaki? Surprise yourselves!

inside_out.title: Inside Out (Uramaki)
inside_out.desc: Master the inside-out technique — rice on the outside, nori on the inside. A classic challenge!

mirror.title: Mirror Rolls
mirror.desc: Each of you makes the exact same roll independently. Compare your results — who nailed it?

restaurant.title: Restaurant Dupe
restaurant.desc: Recreate your favorite sushi restaurant roll from memory. No peeking at the menu!

blind_tasting.title: Blind Tasting
blind_tasting.desc: Rate each other's rolls without knowing the ingredients. Can you guess what's inside?

speed_roll.title: Speed Roll
speed_roll.desc: Set a timer for 10 minutes. Make as many rolls as you can. Ready, set, roll!

journal.title: Sushi Journal
journal.subtitle: Document your sushi evenings
journal.notesPlaceholder: How did it go? Anything special?
journal.empty: No evenings documented yet. Start your sushi story!

settings.title: Settings
settings.resetConfirm: This will delete all your journal entries, ratings, and shopping list. Are you sure?
settings.madeWith: Made with love for sushi nights 🍣

savedRolls.title: Saved Rolls
savedRolls.subtitle: Rolls you bookmarked from the generator
savedRolls.empty: No saved rolls yet. Generate some rolls and bookmark your favorites!

welcome.title: Welcome
welcome.subtitle: Create a shared couple space, or join one
welcome.createDesc: Start fresh and share the link with your partner
welcome.joinDesc: Paste a link you received to join
welcome.linkNotFound: No space found for this link

share.title: Invite link
share.desc: Send this link to your partner to share this space
share.leaveConfirm: Leave this space? You can rejoin with the link.
